## Describe the bug
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

## Steps to reproduce
<!-- 
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error
-->

## Expected behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

## Actual behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what naturally occurs. -->

## Screenshots / logs
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. Paste any relevant console output or pulse.db log dumps here. -->

## Environment
- [ ] OS: <!-- e.g., Windows 10, Windows 11 -->
- [ ] Pulse Version: <!-- e.g., v3.0.0 -->
- [ ] .NET Runtime Version: <!-- e.g., .NET 8.0.319 -->

## Additional context
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here, such as installed ActionEngine Plugins that might be conflicting. -->
